title: New Template
body:
**We're launching a new design.** ![xarop logo](http://farm3.static.flickr.com/2310/1827477560_8de23ae2b6_m.jpg "xarop logo") For this, I used the WordPress theme [Deep Red](http://templates.arcsin.se/deep-red-wordpress-theme/) by the Swedish team [Arcsin](http://arcsin.se/ "Arcsin") as a base and made a few adjustments:

-   I made the theme wider to accommodate 500px photos in the posts.
-   Larger text to improve readability.
-   Various adjustments to the PHP templates and CSS stylesheet.

I also took the opportunity to update to WordPress version 2.3.1 and make the theme compatible, including the tags.
